title: Bequest.
content:
You left me, sweet, two legacies, --
    A legacy of love
    A Heavenly Father would content,
    Had He the offer of;

    You left me boundaries of pain
    Capacious as the sea,
    Between eternity and time,
    Your consciousness and me.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Emily Elizabeth Dickinson delivers a powerful performance in "Bequest."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
